title: Junior Lifecycle & Retention Marketing Specialist
required_skills: 1+ year work experience in marketing, data analytics, product, or operations
Exceptional attention to detail with strong quality control mindset
Advanced Excel skills and experience with data analysis
Proven ability to manage multiple projects while meeting deadlines
Interest in investment and financial products
bonus_skills: Experience with Braze or similar customer engagement platforms
Knowledge of email marketing, mobile push notifications and in-app messaging
matched_skills: 1+ year work experience in marketing and data analytics (4+ years across marketing, PMO, and project coordination roles)
Advanced Excel skills and data analysis
Manage multiple projects while meeting deadlines (Hapag-Lloyd sprint tracking, HSBC $8M programme)
Interest in investment and financial products (HSBC FinTech/Banking experience)
Attention to detail / quality control mindset
missing_skills: Braze or similar customer engagement / CRM automation platform
Mobile push notifications and in-app messaging experience
A/B testing principles in a marketing context
core_responsibilities: Execute and monitor email, push, and in-app campaigns across multi-channel automations
Manage deadlines and dependencies across multiple campaigns and stakeholders
Build and analyze campaign performance reports using Excel and analytics tools
Maintain documentation of campaign setups and results; conduct quality assurance
Optimize customer segments through data analysis and actionable insights
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Excel and data analysis skills — KPI reporting at Hapag-Lloyd and HSBC directly transfers to campaign performance reporting
Frame Hapag-Lloyd project coordination as campaign operations: managing deadlines, dependencies, documentation
Emphasize HSBC FinTech/Banking background to demonstrate genuine interest in financial products
Mention digital campaign exposure at Moli Media as signal of familiarity with marketing execution
Stress attention to detail and quality control mindset as key differentiators for this junior role
Signal willingness to learn Braze quickly given strong analytical and tool-adoption background

company_info.size_raw: International team of 180+ people from 17+ countries
